name: 77 Hoover Block Crips
description: The 77 Hoover Block Crips are one of the original Hoover subsets on the West Side of South Los Angeles, named for their territory around 77th Street and Hoover Street. The Hoovers collectively have been described as one of the most belligerent gang organizations in South LA, feuding with virtually all surrounding gangs except their longtime allies the Main Street Crips.
